name: Our Lemon Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt margarine over low heat.
2. Roll graham crackers into crumbs with a rolling pin.
3. Mix the crumbs and melted margarine to form a crust on the bottom and sides of the pie pan. Chill.
4. Add cold evaporated milk to Dream Whip (do not add vanilla). Sprinkle in 27 packets Equal. Mix according to directions.
5. Beat egg yolks slightly, then gradually stir in lemon juice.
6. Gradually fold in the whipped Dream Whip mixture.
7. Spread the filling over the crust.
8. Turn off the broiler so it will get hot.
9. Beat 3 egg whites until frothy using clean beaters to ensure the whites are as fluffy as possible.
10. Add 1 tablespoon sugar and beat until blended.
11. Add another tablespoon sugar and 27 packets Equal. Beat until soft peaks form.
12. Spread the meringue over the top, making sure it sticks to the edges so it won't shrink when broiled.
13. Place under the broiler for 30-60 seconds until the meringue is lightly browned. Be careful as it can burn easily.
14. Chill for 5 hours before serving to allow the flavors to blend.
Nutrients per serving: Calories 144, fat 5g, cholesterol .6mg, carbohydrate 27g, sodium 81mg.
Exchanges: Bread 1, fruit 1/2, milk 1/2, fat 1.
